scope: EN / global Binance Gold Page only (no localized RU/PT-BR/TR claims yet)

claims.claimText: New users registering via CryptoBonusWorld can receive a welcome bonus of up to 19,800 USDT (task-based; the full amount requires KYC, a qualifying deposit, and trading-volume milestones).
allowedWording: up to 19,800 USDT
welcome bonus of up to 19,800 USDT (task-based; full amount requires milestones)
new-user sign-up reward of up to 19,800 USDT
claims.notes: Currency label differs across screenshot/offer wording; public copy must use the wording verified in current page/evidence and avoid mixing USD/USDT inside the same caption. Landing shows 'USD' marketing label; reward denomination is USDT per evidence (bonus_amount=19800 USDT, conflictStatus ok). Bonus claims have a 7-day staleness clock — re-verify weekly.

claims.claimText: The CryptoBonusWorld referral code for Binance is CRYPTOBONUSW, pre-filled automatically when registering via the CryptoBonusWorld link.
allowedWording: referral code CRYPTOBONUSW
code CRYPTOBONUSW is pre-filled when you register via our link
claims.notes: Affiliate URL is IMMUTABLE (ROLE 0 only). Demo-state screenshot is owner-approved, email empty, form not submitted, no PII.

claims.claimText: Unlocking the Binance welcome bonus is task-based: complete KYC, make a qualifying deposit, and reach trading-volume milestones within the campaign window. Exact deposit amount, expiry, and tiers vary by eligibility/region.
allowedWording: bonus is task-based (KYC + qualifying deposit + trading-volume milestones)
exact requirements vary by eligibility, region, and campaign — verify on the official offer before registering
claims.notes: Evidence flags bonus_expiry_days, bonus_requires_deposit, and bonus_min_deposit as conflictStatus=outdated (confidence 0.27). Specific deposit/expiry figures must NOT be published until re-verified. Keep wording generic until ROLE 4 + ROLE 16 re-check.

claims.claimText: Binance spot trading fees are 0.1% maker / 0.1% taker (standard), reduced ~25% to 0.075% when paying fees with BNB.
allowedWording: 0.1% maker / 0.1% taker spot fee (standard)
0.075% effective with the 25% BNB fee discount
competitive spot fees
claims.notes: Standard tier only; VIP tiers differ. Avoid superlatives.

claims.claimText: Binance USDⓈ-M perpetual futures fees are 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker, with up to 125× leverage on select pairs.
allowedWording: 0.02% maker / 0.05% taker futures fee
up to 125× leverage on select pairs (high liquidation risk)
claims.notes: 125× is a maximum on specific pairs; most pairs capped lower. High-leverage risk warning required.

claims.claimText: Binance P2P provides a public peer-to-peer marketplace with a 0% platform fee and an escrow-protected listing interface.
allowedWording: Binance P2P offers an escrow-protected marketplace with a 0% platform fee
public P2P listing interface (USD/USDT view shown for illustration)
blockedWording: all payment methods available in every country
claims.notes: A USD/USDT public P2P screenshot supports an interface claim only, not universal availability. Screenshot asset pending capture/approval via capture-public-p2p-screenshot.mjs; screenshotEvidence id is a placeholder until the asset is registered.

claims.claimText: P2P availability, fiat currencies, and payment methods vary by country.
allowedWording: P2P availability and payment methods vary by country
available payment methods depend on your region
blockedWording: same P2P offers in every country
claims.notes: Geo-routed content; supports a varies-by-country statement, not a universal-availability statement.

claims.claimText: Binance requires KYC (identity verification) — government-issued ID plus a liveness/selfie check — to unlock full trading, withdrawals, and bonus eligibility.
allowedWording: Binance requires identity verification (KYC)
KYC: government-issued ID + liveness/selfie check
claims.notes: KYC process existence is well-sourced (P0 + P1).

claims.claimText: KYC status, tiers, and account limits may vary by region and account; authenticated KYC screenshots require cropping/blur and owner approval before any public use.
allowedWording: KYC tiers and limits vary by region and account level
verification requirements may differ depending on your country
blockedWording: identical limits for all users worldwide
claims.notes: Authenticated KYC capture is owner_manual: forbidden to show documents/selfies/PII. Crop-over-blur per AUTHENTICATED_SCREENSHOT_CAPTURE_FLOW.md; needs ROLE 33 + ROLE 0 before public.

claims.claimText: Binance publishes Proof of Reserves on an official page (Merkle-tree based, monthly), letting users verify their balance is included.
allowedWording: publishes Proof of Reserves
Proof of Reserves is visible on the official page
Merkle-tree Proof of Reserves published monthly
claims.notes: PoR proves reserve inclusion, not solvency. Do not claim it eliminates risk.

claims.claimText: Binance maintains the SAFU (Secure Asset Fund for Users) emergency fund; in the 2019 breach (7,000 BTC) affected users were reimbursed via SAFU.
allowedWording: maintains the SAFU emergency insurance-style fund
2019 breach victims were reimbursed via SAFU (per Binance's official blog)
claims.notes: Security-incident claim: must be attributed to the Binance official blog source and framed as historical context, not a safety guarantee. Needs ROLE 11 sign-off on wording.

claims.claimText: Binance offers spot, USDⓈ-M futures, Simple Earn/staking, P2P, and iOS/Android apps — product availability depends on region and account.
allowedWording: spot, futures, Earn, P2P, and mobile apps (availability depends on your region)
broad product ecosystem; some products are restricted in certain regions
blockedWording: every feature available in every country
claims.notes: Evidence marks copyTrading.available=false — do not claim copy trading. App availability is store/region dependent.

claims.claimText: Binance.com does not accept US residents; US users must use the separate Binance.US entity.
allowedWording: Binance.com is not available to US residents
US users must use Binance.US (a separate regulated entity)
claims.notes: Country-level restriction claim — re-verify against the official restricted list before publishing.

claims.claimText: Binance.com is not available to UK residents following FCA action in 2021.
allowedWording: Binance.com is not available to UK residents
UK access is restricted following FCA action
claims.notes: Country-level restriction claim — re-verify against the official restricted list before publishing.

claims.claimText: Availability of Binance.com and individual products varies by country and product; some regions are restricted.
allowedWording: availability varies by country and product
some countries and products are restricted — check the official restricted-countries list
claims.notes: Do not publish any specific banned/restricted-country list without a current official source. manualReviewRequired enforced.

claims.claimText: Binance is the largest CEX by volume — ~$8.31B 24h spot volume, CoinGecko trust score 10/10 (rank #2), ~1,368 active spot pairs (as of the last data pull).
allowedWording: as of {date}, ~$8.31B 24h spot volume
CoinGecko trust score 10/10 (rank #2) as of the last data pull
one of the largest exchanges by trading volume
claims.notes: Point-in-time aggregator data; must carry an 'as of {date}' qualifier and be re-pulled weekly.
